AGE OF DINO
NEXT-GEN DINOSAUR-THEMED
4X STRATEGY
AND BLOCKCHAIN GAME
Swipe Up
VIDEO
Age of Dino The world's first dinosaur game rooted in blockchain technology.
Next-Gen 4X Strategy Game
Age of Dino is a next-generation MMO strategy game that merges elements from Web3.0 and traditional gaming platforms, positioning itself to attract both veteran players and newcomers transitioning into digital play. AOD's free-to-play-and-own feature enables players to own in-game assets and earnings using blockchain technology for digital collectibles.
Storyline
Storyline
In the near future, it appears that Earth has exhausted God's patience. A colossal comet strikes the planet, triggering a profound shift in humanity's destiny. In close proximity to the impact zone, a bountiful reserve of amber is unearthed. Within these ambers lie the genetic essence of prehistoric creatures, proving to be a pivotal breakthrough for Dr. Gibbs in the realm of decoding and reassembling ancient biological genes...
Core Gameplay
- Assemble / Train / Collect / Research. Build your own dinosaur park and troops.
- Use NFTs to experience various gameplay and earn profits.
- Join alliances and participate in MMO battles.
01

INTEROPERABLE NFTS
N
F
T
s
MechPal NFT
MechPal, your steadfast companion, is poised to assist you with acquiring tickets within the immersive future game ecosystem.
Dinosaur NFT
Dinosaur NFTs are collectible digital dinosaurs that players can deploy alongside their troops to greatly enhance their strength and give the player an opportunity to obtain token rewards.
More NFTs
A wider variety of NFTs will soon be available. Make sure to stay connected for updates.
I
P U
N
I
V
E
R
S
E
The Dinosaur-themed IP Universe consists of a variety of high-end games, all interconnected via Dinosaur NFTs. This integration boosts asset demand by enabling the sharing and circulation of assets, such as dinosaurs and heroes, owned by players. It goes beyond a typical game, providing an immersive game universe where a player-driven economy and real money flourish.

ROADMAP
The future is coming!
2021.H2
- Age of Dino (AOD) started development
2022.H1
- Continuous development
- Game and NFT art style confirmed
2022.H2
- Continuous development
- Playable MVP completed
2023.H1
- Social media accounts release
- Internal beta test of AOD game
2023.H2
- Official website release
- MechPal NFT Free Mint
- Dino Ski Mini Game release
2024
- Official launch of AOD game
- Utility Token & Governance Token TGE
- Iterative development and updates
2025
- To be revealed
2026
- To be revealed
